must_detect.matched_text: Positive MNPI — financing: We have received a pre-signing, non-binding term sheet for an ESG-linked revolving credit facility from Mariner Jade Bank (Singapore) Limited (fictional); terms are under negotiation and remain undisclosed pending Board approval and an SEA‑compliant stock exchange announcement.

To: Board and Compliance Committee, Orchid Meridian Public Company Limited (OM‑PCL)
Subject: PDPA/SEA compliance update on training materials using crypto/ESG/cyber/insider-list/information-barrier vocabulary; no price-sensitive content except as noted

Crypto (marketing): Q3 brochure for “OM Crypto Rewards” describes wallet hygiene and merchant QR acceptance as educational content only; no token issuance, no exchange listing, and no revenue guidance.
ESG/climate (public): Our 2025 emissions target and solar retrofit milestones are already in the One Profile (public), and the sustainability KPIs used in supplier scorecards are unchanged.
Cyber (tabletop): IT ran a tabletop exercise and phishing drill; there is no reportable incident, outage, or customer data loss; only playbook updates ensued.
Insider-list (policy): The training deck uses placeholder roles (e.g., “CFO”, “IR”) without names, and the sample insider list is a blank form; PDPA reminder to avoid adding personal emails until an actual deal trigger.
Information-barrier/blackout (education): The quarterly refresher reiterates wall-crossing procedures, tipping prohibitions, and a standard blackout window example; these are policy examples, not live restrictions.
Cross-border docs (operations): Template NDAs and a draft DPA with Cloud Strata Services Sdn. Bhd. (fictional, MY) are procedural; data fields are redacted and retain Thai PDPA controller–processor clauses.
Employment (PDPA): HR is updating the consent form and privacy notice; training uses generic employee ID placeholders and no personal files are attached.
Commercial terms (benign): Procurement’s published “Standard Trading Terms v3.2‑TH” clarifies payment cycles and service levels; no counterparty-specific pricing or exclusivity is included.
Positive MNPI — financing: We have received a pre-signing, non-binding term sheet for an ESG-linked revolving credit facility from Mariner Jade Bank (Singapore) Limited (fictional); terms are under negotiation and remain undisclosed pending Board approval and an SEA‑compliant stock exchange announcement.
Disclosure planning: If executed, we will prepare a current report and update the One Profile; until then, only the Treasury, Legal, and IR role groups are wall‑crossed and will be added to the insider list at signing.
